title: Recognition of gain or loss; general rule
doc_html:
§132.  Recognition of gain or loss; general rule

Upon the sale or exchange of property, the entire amount of the gain or loss determined under R.S. 47:131 shall be recognized, except as provided in R.S. 47:133 through 47:138.
doc_text:
§132.  Recognition of gain or loss; general rule
Upon the sale or exchange of property, the entire amount of the gain or loss determined under R.S. 47:131 shall be recognized, except as provided in R.S. 47:133 through 47:138.
